summary: Governance package for the external Obsidian operations hub that receives validated long-lived governance traces.
purpose: Define the export, retention, and trace-linking contract for the external governance journal sink without implementing vault runtime logic in ai-governance.

approval_boundary: medium for bounded read-only workflow tuning and contract maintenance
high for write or delete capability expansion
forbidden_actions: Unbounded file reads or path escape
Write-capable tool expansion without high-tier review
primary_users: architect-owner operating the external Obsidian governance hub

start_conditions: Run bash scripts/validate_all.sh and bash scripts/test_determinism.sh.
Run bridge dry-run before export contract rollout.
steady_state: Export long-lived governance traces from traces/ only after validation.
Keep runtime vault operations outside ai-governance.
failure_response: Freeze rollout on schema failure, determinism mismatch, or missing trace or evidence refs.
Restore the last compliant contract set and re-run all governance scripts.
Record key revocation rationale in external governance diary artifacts.
rollback_reference: Revert the latest obsidian-mcp governance export contract changes.
Re-run validation and determinism checks before reopening.
access_revocation: Rotate credentials when boundary violations are detected.
Limit access to owner and reviewer roles only.

failure_modes: Vault path escape or unbounded file reads.
Sensitive note metadata leaking into export artifacts.
Policy drift when enabling write-capable tools.
mandatory_controls: Strict boundary checks and deterministic rejection contracts.
Internal classification and redaction before export.

retention_policy: Keep traces/ as the short-term in-repo governance diary.
Export long-lived records to the external Obsidian governance hub after validation.
Escalate and redact if PII appears in artifacts.

conditions: Export only validated governance trace bundles.
Require a receipt artifact before export is considered complete.

access_controls: RBAC for owner or reviewer roles only.
Every approval and execution artifact must remain trace-linked.

extension_baseline: The external runtime is the long-lived governance diary sink.
The governance core stores only policy-bound artifacts before export.
permissions_scope: Write or delete capability onboarding is high tier.

critical_metrics.notes: Every vault operation decision remains trace-linked.
Schema and guardrail checks must remain stable.
Bridge-path p95 latency for vault-read workflows.

error_budget: Track burn by explainability and validation misses.
Freeze non-essential changes when burn exceeds 50 percent before mid-window.

change_log.change: Collapsed obsidian-mcp governance docs into a single JSON contract bundle.
Added obsidian-mcp governance onboarding package and linked the read-only vault path to central contracts.
